objectSets.name: First Pass - Insert with Draft Status

objects.query: SELECT CompanyName, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, LegalEntityCity, LegalEntityCountry, LegalEntityPostalCode, LegalEntityState, LegalEntityStreet, Name, Status FROM LegalEntity
SELECT Description, Name, Status, TreatmentSelection FROM TaxPolicy
SELECT Description, IsTaxable, LegalEntityId, LegalEntity.Name, Name, ProductCode, Status, TaxCode, TaxEngineId, TaxEngine.TaxEngineName, TaxPolicyId, TaxPolicy.Name FROM TaxTreatment
SELECT TaxPolicyId, TaxPolicy.Name, StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Name, Status FROM TaxTreatment WHERE Status = 'Draft'
SELECT DefaultTaxTreatmentId, DefaultTaxTreatment.Name, Description, Name, Status, TreatmentSelection FROM TaxPolicy WHERE Status = 'Draft'
